articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: Former Strictly host Daly and Radio 2 presenter Kay jointly announced they are "to separate amicably".
articles.title: Tess Daly and Vernon Kay separating after 22 years of marriage

articles.description: Saturday's papers lead with calls for the PM to quit after Labour's local election losses and Tess Daly and Vernon Kay's marriage split.
articles.title: Newspaper headlines: 'Labour's historic battering' and 'Vernon and Tess split'

articles.description: John Swinney's party finished comfortably ahead of its rivals, but short of an overall majority.
articles.title: SNP wins Scottish election as Reform and Labour tie for second

articles.description: GWR, which runs trains between London and South Wales, will come under government control.
articles.title: Great Western Railway to be renationalised by end of 2026

articles.description: Seasoned staycationers share their favourite spots as Airbnb and Booking.com say interest in UK stays are up on last year.
articles.title: The UK is set for a staycation summer - and there are plenty of hidden gems

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: The naturalist's seven-decade career was marked with a night of memories, live music and special guests at the Royal Albert Hall.
articles.title: Attenborough at 100: Prince William congratulates Sir David on 'remarkable milestone'

articles.description: Those within the UFO community spent their day scrutinizing the new documents, images and videos released by the Pentagon.
articles.title: The UFO community has been waiting for answers. Has the Pentagon delivered?
